title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect — Authentication Bypass
description: ConnectWise ScreenConnect authentication bypass leading to remote code execution.

title: Apache ActiveMQ — Remote Code Execution
description: Apache ActiveMQ RCE vulnerability exploited to deploy ransomware and web shells.

title: Fortinet FortiOS — Out-of-Bound Write
description: Fortinet FortiOS out-of-bounds write vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

title: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS — OS Command Injection
description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS command injection via GlobalProtect, actively exploited in the wild.

title: Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway — Buffer Overflow
description: Citrix NetScaler sensitive information disclosure leading to session hijacking. Dubbed Citrix Bleed.

title: Critical Remote Code Execution in Microsoft Outlook
description: A critical zero-day remote code execution vulnerability in Microsoft Outlook is being actively exploited. Attackers send specially crafted emails to execute arbitrary code without user interaction.

title: Critical Remote Code Execution Vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange Server
description: A critical remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Exchange Server that could allow an attacker to run arbitrary code.

title: Critical Remote Code Execution in Windows Hyper-V
description: A remote code execution vulnerability in Windows Hyper-V could allow an attacker on a guest VM to execute code on the host OS.

title: Important Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability in Windows Kernel
description: An elevation of privilege vulnerability in the Windows Kernel allows a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

title: Moderate Information Disclosure in Azure DevOps Server
description: An information disclosure vulnerability in Azure DevOps Server may expose sensitive repository data.
